title: avenula pruinosa
intro: Avenula pruinosa, also known as the hairy oat-grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Avenula pruinosa include soothing irritated throats, relieving congestion, and promoting overall respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Avenula pruinosa often involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and stems, which can be consumed as teas or used in topical applications.
